---
title: "G1-2 synthetic output"
subtitle: "recursive training essai"
date: "2026-05-25"
categories:
   - LLMs
   - model collapse
   - entropy
   - AI texts
bibliography: LXtech.bib
# format: html
# toc: true
# toc-depth: 3
# toc-expand: true

# css: https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/school/css/style.css
---

-----

> [textur](textur001.qmd.qmd) / [kybernetik](textur002.qmd) / model collapse

-----

{{< include _model-collapse.qmd >}}

# references
